title: humboltia lanceana
intro: Humboldtia lanceana, also known as the lanceolate Humboldtia, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Humboldtia lanceana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make a paste or decoction, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
